markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 28, 2026 8 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 81.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Isis Louise Van den Broek wins the Maquet vs Van den Broek professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Alkmaar Final after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Maquet vs Van den Broek professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Alkmaar Final after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Isis Louise Van den Broek win the Maquet vs Van den Broek: W15 Alkmaar Final match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Pete Alonso records 1+ stolen bases in Washington vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Pete Alonso is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Pete Alonso starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Pete Alonso is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Pete Alonso is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Pete Alonso: 1+ stolen bases?

markets.rules_primary: If Miomir Kecmanovic records at least 4 total match aces in the full match of the Jannik Sinner vs Miomir Kecmanovic professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ace: A serve that lands in the service box and is not touched by the receiving player (including their racket, body, or clothing), resulting in an immediate point for the server.

If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If a retirement occurs, all markets will resolve based on the statistics officially completed and recorded prior to the cancellation or discontinuation of the match.
markets.title: Will Miomir Kecmanovic record at least 4 total match aces in the Jannik Sinner vs Miomir Kecmanovic match?
